Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena

Class RdfStreamParserSession

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ContextSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.ParserSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.InputStreamParserSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.RdfStreamParserSession
All Implemented Interfaces:
BeanSession, ConverterSession
public class RdfStreamParserSession extends InputStreamParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of RdfStreamParser.
Notes:
  • This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
See Also:
  • {doc jmr.RdfDetails}

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static RdfStreamParserSession.Builder create(RdfStreamParser ctx)
      Creates a new builder for this object.
      Parameters:
      ctx - The context creating this session.
      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      A new builder.

    • hasNativeBytes

      public boolean hasNativeBytes()
      Description copied from class: InputStreamParserSession
      Returns whether this binary parser has a native byte-array wire type.

      Mirror of OutputStreamSerializerSession.hasNativeBytes() for the parse side. When true, byte[] payloads are consumed natively from the binary stream (e.g. MsgPack bin family, CBOR byte-string major type 2, BSON binary subtype 0x05) and BinarySwap skips so the raw bytes reach the bean property directly. When false the parser surfaces byte[] payloads as a string (UTF-8 column for Parquet, plain literal for binary RDF) and BinarySwap fires to apply the configured BinaryFormat reverse decoding back to byte[].

      Defaults to true. Subclasses without a native byte-array wire type (e.g. ParquetParserSession and the binary RDF parser sessions) override and return false.

      Overrides:
      hasNativeBytes in class InputStreamParserSession
      Returns:
      true if this parser has a native byte-array wire type.

    • doParse

      protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException
      Description copied from class: ParserSession
      Workhorse method.

      Subclasses are expected to implement this method or Parser.doParse(ParserSession,ParserPipe,ClassMeta).

      The default implementation of this method simply calls Parser.doParse(ParserSession,ParserPipe,ClassMeta).

      Overrides:
      doParse in class ParserSession
      Type Parameters:
      T - The class type of the object to create.
      Parameters:
      pipe - Where to get the input from.
      type - The class type of the object to create. If null or Object.class, object type is based on what's being parsed. For example, when parsing JSON text, it may return a String, Number, JsonMap, etc...
      Returns:
      The parsed object.
      Throws:
      IOException - Thrown by underlying stream.
      ParseException - Malformed input encountered.
      ExecutableException - Exception occurred on invoked constructor/method/field.

    • isLooseCollections

      protected final boolean isLooseCollections()
      Collections should be serialized and parsed as loose collections.
      Returns:
      true if collections of resources are handled as loose collections of resources in RDF instead of resources that are children of an RDF collection (e.g. Sequence, Bag).
      See Also:
      • RdfStreamParser.isLooseCollections()

    • isTrimWhitespace

      protected final boolean isTrimWhitespace()
      Trim whitespace from text elements.
      Returns:
      true if whitespace in text elements will be automatically trimmed.
      See Also:
      • RdfStreamParser.isTrimWhitespace()
